title: Mute Allay
description: Mutes Allay taking damage, usefull for an XP farm using Allays
body: This resource pack mutes only the Allay hurt sounds. It’s useful for XP farms that use Allays together with the Potion of Infestation. All other sounds remain unchanged—only the hurt sounds are removed, which almost completely eliminates the repetitive strain of those noises.
